title: phalaenopsis amabilis var. aurea
intro: Phalaenopsis amabilis var. aurea, also known as the golden moon orchid, is a variety of the Phalaenopsis amabilis species, a type of flowering orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Phalaenopsis amabilis var. aurea include its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
